---
title: "Work 2026"
---

Notes, reading lists, and works in progress for my thesis.

## Reading

- [2025](reading-2025/papers.qmd)
- [January 2026](reading-01-2026/papers.qmd)
- [February 2026](reading-02-2026/papers.qmd)
- [March 2026](reading-03-2026/papers.qmd)

## Notes

- [CTC Segmentation](ctc-segmentation/index.qmd)
- [Irish ASR](irish-asr-notes/refs.qmd)
- [North Sami ASR](north-sami-asr-notes/papers.qmd)
- [Spoken Sentence Transformers](spoken-sentence-transformers/refs.qmd)
- [KBLabb Notes](kblabb-notes/index.qmd)
- [Aligning Whisper Output](align-whisper/index.qmd)
- [Correcting Whisper Splits](correct-whisper/index.qmd)
- [Literary Edition Alignment](editions-alignment/index.qmd)

## Papers

- [My Papers](my-papers/papers.qmd)
- [Colleagues' Theses](colleagues-theses/theses.qmd)
